patch.value: The hooks capability has zero first-party exemplar; authors wanting to intercept writes/reads for audit/cache/telemetry have no reference. pm-governance-audit is the natural owner.
Registers an opt-in onWrite hook logging mutated path/scope to a sidecar; manifest gains hooks capability; unit test verifies firing; SDK.md hooks section references it.

value.author: package-hooks-subagent
value.text: Subagent package/runtime findings: pm-governance-audit currently exposes only commands/schema in package manifest and extension manifest, with command-only activation for comments-audit/dedupe-audit/normalize; add hooks capability before calling api.hooks.onWrite/onRead or doctor will fail with extension_capability_missing. Runtime names are api.hooks.onWrite/onRead/onIndex and policy surfaces hooks.onwrite/hooks.onread/hooks.onindex; OnWriteHookContext carries path/scope/op plus optional item_id,item_type,before,after,changed_fields, while onRead has path/scope only. Recommended exemplar: opt-in onWrite sidecar logger disabled by default via env/config flag, append compact JSONL outside .agents/pm items/history to avoid recursive tracked writes, redact/summarize before/after, include op/path/scope/item_id/changed_fields, and cover activation with @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk/testing assertRegisteredHook plus a temp PM_PATH smoke. Compatibility risks: built index.js/manifest.json must stay in sync with TS, package entry still deep-loads dist/sdk/runtime.js via PM_CLI_PACKAGE_ROOT for governance commands, and current project doctor shows zero active hook counts because only pm-changelog is installed.

value.author: hooks-tests-subagent
value.text: Subagent tests/SDK findings: Existing coverage: tests/unit/sdk-index.spec.ts::sdk testing helpers covers activateExtensionForTest/assertRegisteredHook; tests/unit/builtin-extension-entrypoints.spec.ts::registers a dedicated default-inert afterCommand hook exemplar covers pm-lifecycle-hooks only; tests/integration/extension-hooks.integration.spec.ts::passes affected item transition context to afterCommand hooks and tests/integration/cli.integration.spec.ts::runs extension read/write/index hooks cover generic hook dispatch. Gap for pm-governance-audit: packages/pm-governance-audit/extensions/governance-audit/{index.ts,index.js,manifest.json,README.md} still commands/schema only, so add focused tests in tests/unit/builtin-extension-entrypoints.spec.ts verifying governance manifest declares hooks and assertRegisteredHook(...on_write/on_read...) plus sidecar no-op/default opt-in behavior, update tests/unit/package-manifest.spec.ts capability/source guards as needed, and add one sandbox integration/manual package install smoke proving create/update/get emit audit sidecar entries without leaking full item bodies. Risks: manifest/TS/JS drift, generic hook tests passing while package entrypoint lacks hooks, sidecar path/privacy defaults, and SDK helper coverage not exercising actual governance package hooks.

value.author: release-docs-subagent
value.text: Subagent docs/release findings: docs/RELEASING.md, auto-release.yml, release.yml, package.json agree on package-owned pm-changelog full-history generation and mandatory SENTRY_PERSONAL_ADMIN_TOKEN before publish/tag reliability gates; installed pm-changelog manifest/package are 2026.6.6, matching npm latest. For pm-7m8p implementation, current gap is pm-governance-audit still declares capabilities [commands,schema] and README commands only, while docs/EXTENSIONS.md describes onWrite/onRead hook contracts but names pm-lifecycle-hooks as the only hook exemplar; add hooks capability + SDK.md/EXTENSIONS.md/README coverage after implementation. Current GitHub surfaces: gh pr list=[]; gh issue list=[]; latest main Docs+CI run 27069575134/27069575160 green; Dependabot open alerts=0; secret scanning open alerts=0; code scanning API returned 404 no analysis/scope note; pnpm audit clean; pnpm outdated only commander 14.0.3 -> 15.0.0, but commander@15 requires Node >=22.12.0 so do not bump while Node 20 is supported. Observability: sentry-telemetry-gate best-effort passed with SENTRY_PERSONAL_ADMIN_TOKEN, critical=0 high=0, telemetry finish_error_rate=1.82%, missing error-code rows=0; telemetry stack health shows API ok version 2026.6.6, queue depth 0, 11542 events in last 24h. Concrete closeout checks to run after changes: pnpm build; node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/package-hooks*.ts tests/package-*.ts or focused hook/runtime specs; pm package doctor --project --detail deep --trace; isolated temp PM_PATH/PM_GLOBAL_PATH install/activate governance-audit and verify onWrite sidecar; pnpm changelog:pm:check; pnpm audit --audit-level moderate; node scripts/release/sentry-telemetry-gate.mjs --json --telemetry-mode best-effort --max-critical 0 --max-high 0 --max-telemetry-error-rate 10 --max-telemetry-missing-error-rows 0; bash scripts/prod/telemetry/check-stack-health.sh; gh run list/gh pr checks on PR head.

value.author: codex-implementation
value.text: Evidence: implemented pm-governance-audit as the first-party governance hook exemplar. Changed manifest/package metadata to declare hooks, registered default-inert onRead/onWrite hooks, added opt-in PM_GOVERNANCE_AUDIT_HOOK_LOG compact JSONL sidecar without body/snapshot fields, updated SDK/extension/package docs, and added package-specific regression coverage. Verification passed: focused unit/package/SDK tests 62/62; pnpm build; isolated temp PM_PATH/PM_GLOBAL_PATH install smoke with pm install governance-audit, create/update/get hook sidecar, and package doctor; node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage 146 files, 2517 tests, 100% statements/branches/functions/lines; pnpm changelog:pm:check unchanged; pm validate history drift ok with pre-existing resolution warnings only; pnpm audit clean; pm package doctor project deep trace ok; GitHub open PRs/issues/dependabot/secret alerts all zero; Sentry gate critical=0 high=0 and telemetry finish error rate 1.83%; telemetry stack healthy with queue depth 0 and 11574 events in last 24h.

patch.value: pm-governance-audit declares hooks, registers opt-in read/write audit hooks, documents the package-author pattern, and passes focused/full validation.

Manifest/package metadata declare hooks; onRead/onWrite hooks append compact JSONL only when PM_GOVERNANCE_AUDIT_HOOK_LOG is set; docs and tests updated; temp install smoke, package doctor, focused tests, full 100% coverage, changelog check, audit, GitHub, Sentry, and telemetry gates passed.

Delivered pm-governance-audit onRead/onWrite governance hook exemplar with opt-in compact sidecar logging, package/docs/test coverage, isolated package smoke, 100% coverage, changelog/security/GitHub/telemetry validation.
